title: GT's Generic Client Pack
description: A pack that optimizes the client-side and also improves the quality of life.
body:
### Performance
Using modern performance mods like Sodium the game will get increased FPS and decreased usage; anywhere and on everything.
### Quality of Life
The majority of the mods included are QOL, they only increase either the efficency or fun you can have. This is done by changing things that "should" be vanilla.
### Client Centric
Based on fabric, this modpack is great for clients on both singleplayer and multiplayer worlds. It allows you to connect to every server you want (depending on version). Since this modpack is client based it can be mixed with any other modpacks or it added to. Not to be used on servers (coming soon!).
### Highlighted Mods
- Sodium
- Controlify
- Distant Horizons
- Jade
- GUI Compass and Clock
- Immediately Fast
- Not Enough Animations
- First Person View Model
- Shoulder Surfing
- Visuality
- Sounds
